summary: Iteration 68: Deadline & SLA Tracker feature fully tested. All 4 API endpoints working correctly (GET case deadlines, POST create, DELETE, GET overview). Frontend components verified: DeadlineTracker in Client portal (Deadlines tab) and CM Dashboard (Deadlines & SLA tab), DeadlineOverviewWidget on Admin Dashboard. Auto-detection of document expiry working. Color-coded urgency badges (red/amber/yellow/green) displaying correctly. CM can create/delete manual deadlines. Client can view but not modify deadlines.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data. Client LEAMSS-2024-0001 has 20+ deadlines including expired IELTS and critical medical.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 68 verified Deadline & SLA Tracker feature. Key findings: 1) Backend API /api/deadlines with 4 endpoints all working. 2) Auto-detection calculates document expiry from DOC_VALIDITY dict (passport 10yr, IELTS 2yr, medical 1yr, etc.). 3) Manual deadlines stored in case_deadlines_col with source='manual'. 4) Urgency levels: expired (red), critical <=7d (red), urgent <=30d (amber), warning <=60d (yellow), safe (green). 5) Client Deadlines tab shows stats row + filter pills + deadline cards with urgency badges. 6) CM Deadlines & SLA tab has Add Deadline button + form + delete (trash icon) for manual deadlines. 7) Admin Dashboard shows DeadlineOverviewWidget with top 5 urgent alerts across all cases. 8) Notifications created when deadline has auto_remind=true.

api_get_case_deadlines.details: Returns deadlines array + summary with total/expired/critical/urgent/safe counts. Merges auto-detected document expiry + manual deadlines.

api_create_deadline.details: CM/Admin can create manual deadlines. Client gets 403. Creates notification if auto_remind=true.

api_delete_deadline.details: CM/Admin can delete manual deadlines. Client gets 403. Returns 404 for non-existent.

api_overview.details: Admin/CM can view cross-case alerts sorted by urgency. Client gets 403.

client_deadlines_tab.details: Sidebar shows 'Deadlines' tab. DeadlineTracker component with summary header (alerts count), stats row (Total/Expired/Critical/Urgent/Safe), filter pills, deadline cards with urgency badges.

cm_deadlines_sla_tab.details: Sidebar shows 'Deadlines & SLA' tab. DeadlineTracker with Add Deadline button + form. Can create/delete manual deadlines.

admin_overview_widget.details: DeadlineOverviewWidget on Admin Dashboard shows urgent alerts with case info.

auto_detected_deadlines.details: Documents with expiry_date show 'Auto' badge. Documents without expiry get estimated expiry based on DOC_VALIDITY dict and show 'Est.' badge.

manual_deadlines.details: Manual deadlines show 'Manual' badge. Only CM/Admin can create. Trash icon visible for deletion.

color_coding.details: Red=expired/critical, Amber=urgent, Yellow=warning, Green=safe. Verified in UI.

ui_verification_screenshots.client_deadlines_tab: 20 deadlines, 1 expired IELTS (54d ago), 1 critical medical (6d left), stats row visible
ui_verification_screenshots.cm_deadline_form: Add Deadline form with title, date, type, step, description fields
ui_verification_screenshots.cm_deadline_created: TEST_UI_Deadline created with 'Manual' badge, 27d left, trash icon visible
ui_verification_screenshots.admin_dashboard: DeadlineOverviewWidget showing 2 urgent alerts (IELTS expired, medical critical)
